title: Kanecta Config
description: Bootstrap configuration for the Kanecta platform. Tells the system where datastores live and how to connect to remotes. Not a Kanecta item — exists one layer below the datastore. String values beginning with '$' are resolved from environment variables at runtime (e.g. '$KANECTA_DB_PASSWORD').

specVersion.description: Version of the Kanecta config schema this file conforms to (e.g. '1.4.0').

default.description: Name of the workspace to use when none is specified. Must be a key in 'workspaces'.

workspaces.description: Named workspace definitions. Each workspace is a local datastore with optional remote connections.

studioPort.description: Port for the Kanecta Studio UI server. Defaults to 9743 if absent.

apiPort.description: Port for the Kanecta API server. Defaults to 9744 if absent.

local.description: Absolute path to the local filesystem datastore directory.

remotes.description: Named remote connections. 'origin' is the conventional default, mirroring Git. Multiple remotes are supported.

branch.description: Active branch name for this workspace. Defaults to 'main'.

remote.description: A remote datastore connection. Type determines the required fields. String values beginning with '$' are resolved from environment variables at runtime.

host.description: Postgres host. Supports '$VAR' env var resolution.

port.description: Postgres port. Defaults to 5432. Supports '$VAR' env var resolution.

database.description: Database name. Supports '$VAR' env var resolution.

user.description: Database user. Supports '$VAR' env var resolution.

password.description: Database password. Use '$VAR' env var reference — do not hardcode secrets.

path.description: Absolute path to the SQLite database file. Supports '$VAR' env var resolution.

url.description: Base URL of the Kanecta server (e.g. 'https://kanecta.acme.com').

apiKey.description: API key for authentication. Use '$VAR' env var reference — do not hardcode secrets.
